tasks.title: Document build tooling baseline
tasks.description: Summarize current ForgeGradle/Forge/mapping versions and Java toolchain state in PLAN.md for migration context.
acceptance: PLAN.md captures Gradle, Forge, mapping, and Java versions in use today.
Identified upgrade gaps feeding into Stage S2 tasks.

tasks.title: Document source layout and entrypoint gaps
tasks.description: Map current source tree, note absence of gameplay packages and @Mod entrypoint, and record implications for migration.
acceptance: PLAN.md lists existing packages under src/main/java and highlights missing runtime module.
Follow-up tasks reference canonical package names for new runtime scaffolding.

tasks.title: Catalog registries & missing content
tasks.description: List expected block/item/block entity/menu/recipe/sound registries based on API and lang files, noting missing implementations.
acceptance: PLAN.md enumerates registry domains requiring DeferredRegister rebuilds.
Gaps mapped to specific Stage S3/S9 tasks.

tasks.title: Review networking API expectations
tasks.description: Summarize INetworkManager responsibilities and data buffer usage to guide SimpleChannel migration.
acceptance: PLAN.md captures packet categories (tile sync, gui, item) and required features.
Stage S5 tasks reference this audit for packet coverage.

tasks.title: Review config expectations
tasks.description: Document legacy config lifecycle described by API, identify mapping to ForgeConfigSpec tiers.
acceptance: PLAN.md captures config phases (loadConfigs/preInit/postInit) and migration needs.
Stage S7 tasks mapped to address config lifecycle.

tasks.title: Assess capability usage points
tasks.description: List capabilities exposed via IC2Classic (tubes, notifiable machines, armor) and note missing attachment hooks.
acceptance: PLAN.md enumerates required capability tokens/providers.
Stage S6 tasks planned for each capability.

tasks.title: Audit data assets and datagen needs
tasks.description: Record present assets (lang only) and missing blockstates/models/loot/tags to scope datagen rebuild.
acceptance: PLAN.md documents asset gaps per domain.
Stage S8 datagen tasks referenced to fill each gap.

tasks.title: Identify client-only hooks
tasks.description: List API references needing Dist.CLIENT gating (renderers, particles, keybinds) for future migration.
acceptance: PLAN.md lists client-only systems for Stage S4 follow-up.
Notes capture any missing classes requiring recreation.

tasks.title: Spot legacy/oversized API classes
tasks.description: Flag API classes likely needing refactor or wrappers to avoid monolithic implementations in new runtime.
acceptance: PLAN.md highlights candidate classes/packages to split or wrap.
Stage S9 tasks reference mitigation strategies.

tasks.title: Upgrade Gradle wrapper to 8.x
tasks.description: Point Gradle wrapper to 8.x distribution supporting ForgeGradle 6 and Java 17.
acceptance: Gradle wrapper references 8.x distribution URL.
Wrapper scripts regenerate without manual edits.

tasks.title: Update build.gradle for Forge 47.x & ForgeGradle 6
tasks.description: Adopt ForgeGradle 6 plugin DSL, bump Forge dependency to 1.20.1-47.x, and switch to Mojang+Parchment mappings.
acceptance: build.gradle uses net.minecraftforge.gradle 6.x and Forge 47.x coordinates.
Mappings configured for Mojang+Parchment 1.20.1.

tasks.title: Refresh gradle.properties for Gradle 8 defaults
tasks.description: Normalize gradle.properties with org.gradle warnings, memory flags, and Java 17 toolchain hints.
acceptance: gradle.properties cleaned of legacy FG flags and includes useful defaults.
Settings align with Gradle 8 recommendations (warnings-as-errors optional toggle).

tasks.title: Add mods.toml and pack metadata
tasks.description: Create Forge 1.20.1 compliant META-INF/mods.toml and pack.mcmeta referencing IndustrialCodex identifiers.
acceptance: mods.toml present with correct loader version range and mod metadata.
pack.mcmeta updated for pack_format 15+.

tasks.title: Update run configurations for ic2 namespace
tasks.description: Replace examplemod run config namespaces with ic2, refresh datagen args, and ensure logging markers remain useful.
acceptance: Run configs reference ic2 mod id for client/server/gameTest/data.
Data run points to src/generated/resources and uses new mod id.

tasks.title: Expand settings.gradle repositories
tasks.description: Add Parchment and other required plugin repositories to pluginManagement for ForgeGradle 6.
acceptance: settings.gradle lists parchment maven and additional plugin repos as needed.
Ensures Gradle sync succeeds post-upgrade.

tasks.title: Create IndustrialCodex mod entrypoint
tasks.description: Add @Mod class wiring mod event bus, forge event bus, and initial logging.
acceptance: @Mod annotated entrypoint exists under ic2 namespace.
Constructor registers listeners on mod event bus without deprecated APIs.

tasks.title: Introduce IC2Constants
tasks.description: Centralize mod id, logger, and resource helpers for reuse across runtime packages.
acceptance: IC2Constants exposes MOD_ID, LOGGER, and helper methods.
IndustrialCodex leverages IC2Constants instead of hardcoded strings.

tasks.title: Bootstrap DeferredRegister infrastructure
tasks.description: Create RegistryBootstrap with DeferredRegisters for blocks, items, block entities, menus, fluids, entity types, recipe types/serializers, sounds, and data components; hook into mod bus.
acceptance: RegistryBootstrap registers all DeferredRegisters to mod event bus.
All registry accessors exposed via static methods for content packages.

tasks.title: Add creative mode tab registry
tasks.description: Define IC2 creative mode tabs leveraging DeferredRegister and supply icon supplier placeholders.
acceptance: Creative mode tab registered via DeferredRegister of CreativeModeTab.
Icon supplier references future item safely via Supplier.

tasks.title: Stub block registry with casing blocks
tasks.description: Create IC2Blocks to register machine casing/base blocks needed for future content.
acceptance: IC2Blocks registers foundational casing blocks via RegistryBootstrap.BLOCKS.
RegistryBootstrap exposes blocks registrar to other packages.

tasks.title: Stub block item registration
tasks.description: Ensure casing blocks gain BlockItem entries and prepare helper for later machine registrations.
acceptance: IC2BlockItems registers BlockItems for casing blocks.
Block registration defers BlockItem creation to avoid classloading issues.

tasks.title: Stub standalone item registry
tasks.description: Introduce IC2Items with representative components (circuits, plates) as placeholders for future expansion.
acceptance: IC2Items registers baseline component items via DeferredRegister.
RegistryBootstrap exposes ITEMS registrar and ensures creative tab population hook exists.

tasks.title: Introduce block entity type registry skeleton
tasks.description: Add IC2BlockEntities with placeholder entries and helper factory methods for machine registration.
acceptance: IC2BlockEntities defines DeferredRegister-backed RegistryObject holders.
Utility builder supports registering block entities with block suppliers.

tasks.title: Introduce menu type registry skeleton
tasks.description: Create IC2MenuTypes for machine UI menus using DeferredRegister and placeholder factories.
acceptance: Menu types registered using MenuType constructors appropriate for 1.20.1.
Factory helpers prepared for future GUI wiring.

tasks.title: Introduce fluid registry skeleton
tasks.description: Add IC2Fluids for fluid types (steam, coolant) with fluid properties placeholders.
acceptance: FluidType and FlowingFluid DeferredRegisters established.
Placeholder registry objects declared for key IC2 fluids.

tasks.title: Introduce entity type registry skeleton
tasks.description: Create IC2EntityTypes with placeholders for utility entities (dynamite, itnt, boats).
acceptance: Entity types registered with correct SpawnPlacements and factory suppliers.
Future attribute hooks documented via TODOs without deprecated API.

tasks.title: Introduce recipe type registry
tasks.description: Define IC2RecipeTypes encapsulating machine recipe types and helper methods for registration.
acceptance: RecipeType holders registered via DeferredRegister.
Helper method available for data-driven recipe registration.

tasks.title: Introduce recipe serializer registry
tasks.description: Add IC2RecipeSerializers with placeholder serializers and builder utilities.
acceptance: Serializer DeferredRegister populated with base serializer stubs.
Serializers reference appropriate recipe type constants.

tasks.title: Introduce sound event registry
tasks.description: Create IC2SoundEvents for machine and tool sounds using DeferredRegister.
acceptance: Sound events registered with namespaced ResourceLocations.
Placeholder RegistryObjects declared for major sound categories.

tasks.title: Introduce data component registry
tasks.description: Register custom DataComponentType entries for IC2 item/block attachments (energy, coolant).
acceptance: DataComponent DeferredRegister initialized and registered.
Components declared with codecs/sync codecs ready for use.

tasks.title: Establish common lifecycle handler
tasks.description: Create CommonLifecycleHandler subscribing to FMLCommonSetupEvent and enqueueing work for registries and network bootstrap.
acceptance: CommonLifecycleHandler listens to mod bus events with proper lambda usage.
IndustrialCodex registers handler without deprecated setup hooks.

tasks.title: Implement module loader bridging
tasks.description: Add ModuleLoader to discover @IC2Plugin modules, call IModule lifecycle methods, and wire into event bus.
acceptance: ModuleLoader scans ModList for IC2Plugin annotations and respects Dist gating.
Lifecycle handler invokes module load phases at appropriate times.

tasks.title: Update IC2Classic helper lifecycle
tasks.description: Connect IC2Classic.setHelper to ModuleLoader results and ensure duplicate set prevention remains.
acceptance: IC2Classic helper is assigned during common setup without violating safeguards.
Helper reset is prevented and error messaging preserved.

tasks.title: Port gameplay event subscriptions
tasks.description: Create GameplayEvents class attaching to MinecraftForge event bus for tick/world interactions using modern events.
acceptance: GameplayEvents registers to Forge EVENT_BUS with non-deprecated annotations.
Event handlers stubbed for world tick, chunk load, and block break logic.

tasks.title: Add server lifecycle hooks
tasks.description: Handle server starting/stopping events for save data and energy net management.
acceptance: ServerLifecycleHandler subscribes via EVENT_BUS or Dist-safe registration.
Energy/tick managers receive start/stop callbacks.

tasks.title: Create client lifecycle entrypoint
tasks.description: Add ClientLifecycle with Dist.CLIENT subscriber to prepare client setup tasks.
acceptance: ClientLifecycle annotated with @Mod.EventBusSubscriber(value = Dist.CLIENT).
Registers client setup listener hooking into event bus safely.

tasks.title: Port color handler registration
tasks.description: Implement ColorHandlerRegistrar to register block/item colors during ColorHandlerEvent.
acceptance: Color handlers registered using modern API without deprecated methods.
ClientLifecycle forwards ColorHandlerEvent to registrar.

tasks.title: Port particle factory registration
tasks.description: Register particle factories via RegisterParticleProvidersEvent with Dist gating.
acceptance: Particle factories registered during RegisterParticleProvidersEvent.
ClientLifecycle adds listener only on client dist.

tasks.title: Port entity renderer registration
tasks.description: Register entity renderers during EntityRenderersEvent.RegisterRenderers.
acceptance: EntityRendererRegistrar registers renderers for IC2 entities.
ClientLifecycle wires event subscriber without mixing server-only code.

tasks.title: Port client input hooks
tasks.description: Register key bindings and input event handlers using RegisterKeyMappingsEvent and ClientTickEvent.
acceptance: Key bindings registered with proper categories and translations.
Input events handle toggles without referencing deprecated classes.

tasks.title: Introduce IC2Network channel
tasks.description: Create IC2Network with SimpleChannel, PROTOCOL_VERSION, and registration entry point.
acceptance: SimpleChannel initialized with explicit protocol version and version check.
CommonLifecycleHandler triggers packet registration during common setup.

tasks.title: Implement NetworkManager bridge
tasks.description: Add NetworkManagerImpl implementing INetworkManager and routing to IC2Network packets.
acceptance: NetworkManagerImpl covers INetworkManager methods with stubbed packet dispatch.
CommonLifecycleHandler exposes NetworkManagerImpl via API helper.

tasks.title: Port tile field sync packet
tasks.description: Implement TileFieldSyncPacket with codec, handler, and registration in IC2Network.
acceptance: Packet encodes/decodes target BlockPos and field identifiers using FriendlyByteBuf.
Handler schedules client thread updates safely.

tasks.title: Port tile event packet
tasks.description: Implement TileEventPacket for key/value events with server->client/client->server routing.
acceptance: Packet carries BlockPos, key, value, and PacketRange metadata.
IC2Network registers packet with correct direction(s).

tasks.title: Port tile data buffer packet
tasks.description: Implement TileDataBufferPacket to sync INetworkDataBuffer payloads.
acceptance: Packet serializes ResourceLocation + buffer payload via INetworkDataBuffer hooks.
Handler ensures buffer creation via registered suppliers.

tasks.title: Port item event packet
tasks.description: Implement ItemEventPacket for player-held items.
acceptance: Packet syncs player ID/item slot with key/value pairs.
IC2Network registers server and client handlers appropriately.

tasks.title: Port item data buffer packet
tasks.description: Implement ItemDataBufferPacket for INetworkDataBuffer on items.
acceptance: Packet encodes stack slot/index plus data buffer ID.
Handler guards against empty stacks and schedules updates.

tasks.title: Implement GUI initial sync packet
tasks.description: Add GuiInitialDataPacket to push CompoundTag snapshots to client screens.
acceptance: Packet transfers CompoundTag and BlockPos/ItemStack context.
Client handler applies data to screen/controller safely.

tasks.title: Implement tracking control packets
tasks.description: Add StartGuiTrackingPacket/StopGuiTrackingPacket to control auto sync lifetimes.
acceptance: Packet toggles tracking state for players using dimension-safe identifiers.
Network registers both directions with appropriate consumers.

tasks.title: Finalize INetworkManager wiring
tasks.description: Update IC2BlockEntities/menus to request sync via NetworkManagerImpl and ensure API helper exposes side-specific managers.
acceptance: INetworkManager gains default helper/static accessor to reach runtime implementation without breaking addons.
NetworkManagerImpl provides client/server delegates respecting Dist.

tasks.title: Bootstrap capability attachment events
tasks.description: Create CapabilityBootstrap to register capability providers on blocks, items, and entities via AttachCapabilitiesEvent.
acceptance: CapabilityBootstrap subscribes to relevant AttachCapabilitiesEvent variants.
CommonLifecycleHandler registers bootstrap during setup.

tasks.title: Implement tube capability provider
tasks.description: Provide TubeCapabilityProvider exposing ITube capability for tube block entities.
acceptance: Provider attaches capability with stable ResourceLocation.
Invalidation handled via LazyOptional.

tasks.title: Implement notifiable machine capability provider
tasks.description: Expose INotifiableMachine capability for machines needing network updates.
acceptance: Provider wraps block entities implementing marker interface.
Capability correctly invalidated on block entity removal.

tasks.title: Implement armor module capability provider
tasks.description: Attach armor capability to powered armor pieces with appropriate serialization.
acceptance: ItemStack capabilities attached via AttachCapabilitiesEvent<ItemStack>.
Provider serializes state via INBTSerializable.

tasks.title: Create capability sync helper
tasks.description: Add CapabilitySyncUtil for sending capability state updates via NetworkManagerImpl.
acceptance: Utility exposes methods to queue sync packets for players around block entities.
NetworkManagerImpl delegates to helper for NBT conversions.

tasks.title: Integrate capability bootstrap with block entities
tasks.description: Update base machine/generator block entities to expose capabilities using new providers.
acceptance: Base machine block entity registers capability providers during initialization.
CapabilityBootstrap identifies machine types requiring attachments.

tasks.title: Attach armor capabilities on equip
tasks.description: Ensure armor capability provider responds to LivingEquipmentChangeEvent for initialization refresh.
acceptance: Armor capability refreshed when armor equipped/unequipped.
Event handler avoids server<->client desync.

tasks.title: Persist capability data to saved data
tasks.description: Introduce SavedData implementation storing global capability state (e.g., energy net, crop data).
acceptance: SavedData registered via ServerLifecycleHandler on server start.
Capability state saved and loaded without NPE risk.

tasks.title: Introduce common config spec
tasks.description: Create IC2CommonConfig with ForgeConfigSpec and register via ModLoadingContext.
acceptance: COMMON config spec defines core gameplay toggles and machine balance values.
Registered during mod construction with correct file name.

tasks.title: Introduce client config spec
tasks.description: Add IC2ClientConfig for rendering/UI toggles and register safely on client dist.
acceptance: Client config registered only on Dist.CLIENT.
Config values exposed via safe accessors for rendering code.

tasks.title: Introduce server config spec
tasks.description: Add IC2ServerConfig for server-only balancing and register during common setup.
acceptance: Server config registered and loaded with COMMON as needed.
Hot-reload safe listeners ensure values propagate to runtime managers.

tasks.title: Wire configs into API helper
tasks.description: Expose config access through APIHelperImpl to maintain addon compatibility.
acceptance: API helper provides getters for config specs/values.
Common config exposes static instance used by helper without NPE.

tasks.title: Handle config reload events
tasks.description: Listen for ModConfigEvent and propagate changes to relevant managers.
acceptance: ModConfigEvent loading/reloading handled without memory leaks.
Managers respond to updated values promptly.

tasks.title: Create datagen entrypoint
tasks.description: Add IC2DataGenerators registering provider scaffolding for runData.
acceptance: Main datagen class registers to GatherDataEvent via Dist safe listener.
Supports server and client data providers.

tasks.title: Add blockstate/model provider
tasks.description: Implement blockstate+model provider generating casing and machine states.
acceptance: Blockstate provider outputs JSON for casing blocks.
Data generator registers provider only on server data run.

tasks.title: Add item model provider
tasks.description: Generate models for base items and block items.
acceptance: Item models generated for components and tools.
Provider respects existing manual overrides when present.

tasks.title: Add loot table provider
tasks.description: Generate block loot tables for casings/machines with correct drops.
acceptance: Loot tables handle silk touch/fortune rules where required.
Provider extends BlockLootSubProvider with correct parameter sets.

tasks.title: Add recipe provider
tasks.description: Generate machine, crafting, and processing recipes from registries.
acceptance: Recipe provider covers crafting + machine recipes using builder helpers.
runData produces valid recipes without errors.

tasks.title: Add block tags provider
tasks.description: Generate block tags for ores, machine harvest requirements, etc.
acceptance: Block tags provider populates forge tag conventions.
Existing resources merged without duplication.

tasks.title: Add item tags provider
tasks.description: Generate item tags for circuits, plates, cables, and upgrades.
acceptance: Item tags provider syncs with block tags provider where needed.
Tags include forge:ingots/* and ic2 categories.

tasks.title: Add fluid tags provider
tasks.description: Generate fluid tags for steam, coolant, and gases.
acceptance: Fluid tags provider registers forge fluid tags without duplicates.
Provider only runs on server data set.

tasks.title: Add language provider
tasks.description: Generate base en_us lang file for new registry keys while preserving manual translations.
acceptance: Lang provider seeds en_us keys for all registered content.
Manual lang files preserved for additional locales.

tasks.title: Add worldgen data providers
tasks.description: Generate configured/placed features for ores and rubber trees.
acceptance: Worldgen provider registers configured + placed features for IC2 resources.
runData outputs JSON under data/ic2/worldgen without errors.

tasks.title: Implement APIHelper runtime bridge
tasks.description: Create APIHelperImpl wiring fluid container lookup, tick helper, and network manager exposure.
acceptance: APIHelperImpl fulfills APIHelper contract without NPEs.
CommonLifecycleHandler assigns helper to IC2Classic during setup.

tasks.title: Provide tick scheduler implementation
tasks.description: Implement TickSchedulerImpl backing APIHelper.getTickHelper with server-safe scheduling.
acceptance: Tick scheduler queues tasks on server thread respecting level separation.
API helper returns singleton instance and clears on server shutdown.

tasks.title: Introduce base machine block/entity classes
tasks.description: Add reusable BaseMachineBlock and BaseMachineBlockEntity handling energy, inventory, and menu hooks.
acceptance: Base machine classes implement use-with-menu, ticker, and capability exposure without deprecated ITickable.
Inventory and energy storage use modern Forge capabilities.

tasks.title: Register furnace-tier machines
tasks.description: Add Macerator, Compressor, Extractor blocks/items/block entities referencing base machine classes.
acceptance: Registry objects for core machines exist and tie to block entity constructors.
Placeholder logic ensures machines appear in creative tab and datagen lists.

tasks.title: Introduce generator base classes
tasks.description: Create BaseGeneratorBlock and BaseGeneratorBlockEntity handling fuel/energy output.
acceptance: Generator base handles energy production tick using capabilities.
Includes hooks for fuel burn time and fluid inputs.

tasks.title: Register generator family blocks
tasks.description: Register generator blocks (Coal, Geothermal, Solar, Water, Wind) and associated block entities.
acceptance: Generator registry objects defined with appropriate properties and block entity types.
Creative tab + datagen placeholders updated accordingly.

tasks.title: Implement electric tool base
tasks.description: Add ElectricToolItem base class and migrate drill/chainsaw registration to new system.
acceptance: Electric tools use Forge item capabilities for energy and interact with IC2DataComponents.
IC2Items registers drills/chainsaw referencing new class.

tasks.title: Implement armor module items
tasks.description: Create ArmorModuleItem handling module capability and energy, register core modules.
acceptance: Armor modules expose armor capability provider and respect config toggles.
Items added to creative tab with proper translation keys.

tasks.title: Implement crop registry runtime
tasks.description: Provide CropRegistryImpl fulfilling ICropRegistry API and register default crops/seeds.
acceptance: CropRegistryImpl registers default crops and updates static INSTANCE/weed references.
API static access safe-guarded against null before init.

tasks.title: Implement reactor base classes
tasks.description: Add NuclearReactorBlock and NuclearReactorBlockEntity scaffolding plus heat management helpers.
acceptance: Reactor block entity manages inventory, heat, and emits appropriate block events.
Block handles interactions and renders correct state properties.

tasks.title: Implement fluid cell items
tasks.description: Create FluidCellItem supporting fluid capabilities and register standard cells.
acceptance: Fluid cells integrate with Forge fluid capability and handle stack interactions.
IC2Items registers empty + filled cell variants as needed.

tasks.title: Add machine recipe builders
tasks.description: Introduce MachineRecipeBuilder utilities and hook serializers to support machine recipes.
acceptance: Builder simplifies creation of processing recipes with conditions.
Serializers updated to use builder output ensuring codec compliance.

tasks.title: Restore scrapbox loot system
tasks.description: Implement IC2LootModifiers to handle scrapbox drops and integrate with datagen.
acceptance: Global loot modifier registered for scrapbox functionality.
Datagen registers modifier provider producing JSON entries.

tasks.title: Implement foam & miner mechanics
tasks.description: Add FoamSprayerBlock/BlockEntity and MinerBlockEntity scaffolding for world interaction tools.
acceptance: Foam sprayer handles block placement and drying timers via new tick scheduler.
Miner entity scaffolding interacts with drill/pipes using new capability system.

tasks.title: Implement compatibility loader
tasks.description: Add CompatLoader to conditionally initialize integrations and invoke from module loader/common setup.
acceptance: CompatLoader checks ModList for partners and registers hooks safely.
CommonLifecycleHandler invokes loader during setup without side effects.

tasks.title: Update README for 1.20.1
tasks.description: Refresh README with new version badges, setup instructions, and migration overview.
acceptance: README reflects Forge 47.x / Minecraft 1.20.1 requirements.
Includes quickstart for runClient/runData tasks.

tasks.title: Add BUILDING guide
tasks.description: Document build prerequisites, Gradle tasks, and IDE import steps in BUILDING.md.
acceptance: BUILDING.md created with reproducible build instructions.
References configs, datagen, and testing expectations.

tasks.title: Add CONTRIBUTING guide
tasks.description: Define contribution guidelines, coding standards, and review cadence.
acceptance: CONTRIBUTING.md created with code style (one public class per file) and testing requirements.
Links to PLAN/progress workflow for contributors.

tasks.title: Add migration notes
tasks.description: Author MIGRATION_NOTES_1_20_1.md summarizing major API changes and addon guidance.
acceptance: Migration notes cover registries, networking, configs, and capabilities changes.
Document references updated API entry points for addon authors.

tasks.title: Add GitHub templates
tasks.description: Provide ISSUE_TEMPLATE/PR_TEMPLATE with instructions referencing migration process.
acceptance: .github directory populated with issue/PR templates reflecting Forge 1.20.1 state.
Templates mention testing + datagen expectations.

tasks.title: Final audit & cleanup
tasks.description: Run final audit ensuring PLAN/progress reflect completion, prune obsolete docs/assets, and prepare release notes.
acceptance: PLAN.md and progress.json marked complete for all tasks.
Changelog or release notes updated summarizing migration.
